'''√h-m-zh''' ('''kahamazh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lanken|lanken]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-m-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lanken|lanken]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √h-m-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kahamazh
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thihamazh || jihamazh || shihamazh || kihamazh
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthuhamazh || jujuhamazh || shushuhamazh || kukuhamazh
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thuhamazh || juhamazh || shuhamazh || kuhamazh
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thuhamazh || juhamazh || shuhamazh || kuhamazh
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thehamazh || jehamazh || shehamazh || kehamazh
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothohamazh || jojohamazh || shoshohamazh || kokohamazh
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thohamazh || johamazh || shohamazh || kohamazh
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thohamazh || johamazh || shohamazh || kohamazh
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || hamazh || hamazh || hamazh || hamazh
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || hamazh || hamazh || hamazh || hamazh
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || hamazh || hamazh || hamazh || hamazh
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || hamazh || hamazh || hamazh || hamazh
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæhamazh || jæhamazh || shæhamazh || kæhamazh
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathahamazh || jajahamazh || shashahamazh || kakahamazh
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thahamazh || jahamazh || shahamazh || kahamazh
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thahamazh || jahamazh || shahamazh || kahamazh
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shahamazh
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshahamazh
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishahamazh
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shahamazhnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshahamazhnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishahamazhnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shahamazhshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshahamazhnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishahamazhshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shahamazhro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshahamazhnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishahamazhro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shahamazhmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshahamazhnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishahamazhmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shahamazhsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshahamazhnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishahamazhsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shahamazhng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshahamazhnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishahamazhng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shahamazhya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshahamazhnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishahamazhya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shahamazhyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshahamazhnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishahamazhyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shahamazhnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshahamazhnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishahamazhnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shahamazhnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshahamazhnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishahamazhnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shahamazhnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshahamazhnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishahamazhnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shahamazhshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshahamazhnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishahamazhshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shahamazhshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshahamazhnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishahamazhshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shahamazhshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshahamazhnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishahamazhshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shahamazhronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshahamazhnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishahamazhronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shahamazhroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshahamazhnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishahamazhroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shahamazhromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshahamazhnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishahamazhromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shahamazhmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshahamazhnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishahamazhmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shahamazhmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshahamazhnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishahamazhmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shahamazhmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshahamazhnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishahamazhmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
